basic_details.job_title: FDDI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff
basic_details.short_information: Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) has released the official Junior Faculty and Academic Support Staff Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the FDDI Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications ranging from 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree with Diploma in Footwear Design, Master Degree/PG Diploma in Design/Leather Design, or Master Degree in Management/Retail, and aged up to 35 years can apply online from the release date up to 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online applica

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree with Diploma in Footwear Design, Master Degree/PG Diploma in Design/Leather Design, Master Degree in Management/Retail
qualification.details: Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Footwear Design & Production: Essential 8th Pass, Desirable 10th Pass. Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design: Essential 8th Pass, Desirable 10th Pass. Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessories Design: 12th Pass or above. Junior Faculty, Footwear Design & Production: Bachelor’s degree or Master’s Degree (minimum 2 years after Graduation) in any field with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university/institute, and Diploma (minimum 1 year duration) in Footwear Design and Manufacturing or Production/Footwear Technology (specialization in design)/Product Design/Design/Accessories Design/Fashion Design from a recognized university/institute OR Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Footwear Technology (specialization in design/Footwear Design and Manufacturing or Production/Product Design/Design/Accessories Design/Fashion Design) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university/institute. Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessories Design: Master Degree of minimum 02 years duration after Graduation or PG Diploma of minimum 2 years duration after graduation in Design / Leather Design /Apparel Design / Garment Manufacturing Technology / Leather Goods & Accessories Design/ Leather Garments with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute OR Master’s Degree of minimum 02 years duration or PG Diploma (of minimum 02 years duration after Graduation) in any field from a recognized University or institute and Bachelor Degree of Diploma (of minimum 03 years duration ) in Design / Leather Design /Apparel Design / Garment Manufacturing Technology / Leather Goods & Accessories Design/ Leather Garments with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute. Junior Faculty, Retail Operations: Master Degree or Master Diploma of 2 years in relevant field with minimum 55% marks or equivalent and 3 Years relevant experience. Junior Faculty, Fashion Merchandise: Master Degree (of min. 02 years after Graduation) or PG Diploma (of min. 02 years after Graduation) in Management/ International Business / Fashion Merchandise/ Marketing / Finance/ Retail / HR with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University / Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Footwear Design & Production
Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Fashion Design
Jr. Lab Assistant, School of Leather Goods & Accessories Design
Junior Faculty, Leather Goods & Accessories Design

salary_details.details: Jr. Lab Assistant (All Schools): Rs. 30,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Footwear Design & Production): Rs. 50,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Leather Goods & Accessories Design): Rs. 50,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Retail Operations): Rs. 50,000/- per month Junior Faculty (Fashion Merchandise): Rs. 50,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the FDDI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of FDDI to complete the application.
